title: Beam Global Full Year 2024 Operating Results
text: 2024 revenues reached $49.3 million (down from $67.4 million in 2023) with a five-year revenue compound annual growth rate of 68%. Commercial entity revenues increased 229% year-over-year with a 124% growth compared to 2022 ($22.0 million). Gross profit was $7.3 million (15% margin), up from $1.2 million (2% margin) in 2023. Adjusted non-GAAP gross margin was 21% (excluding $2.4 million depreciation and $0.7 million amortization). Margin improvement of 13 percentage points. Cash on hand was $4.6 million (down from $10.4 million in 2023). Operating cash burn was $2.2 million for 2024 (improved from $13.3 million in 2023). Backlog of $5.6 million with debt-free status and $100 million unused credit line. Operating loss was $11.7 million (versus $16.3 million in 2023). Non-GAAP operating loss was $8.9 million (24% improvement year-over-year). Strategic developments included acquiring Serbian power electronics manufacturer Telcom, securing $7.4 million U.S. Army order (88 EV ARC systems), securing $4.8 million Department of Homeland Security order, and launching four new products: BeamSpot, BeamBike, BeamPatrol, BeamWell.
